name: @ai-native-methodology/drift-validator
description: Drift validator — single source of truth, dual rendering (.mermaid <-> .json) semantic equivalence checker + cross-schema enum SSOT 정합 check (v0.4.1) + cross_consistency_check / is_intent⇔classification 동치 enforcement 구조 check (v0.4.2 / Phase 2 ⑤) + canonical 단일 alias 폐기 guard (v0.4.3 / 묶음 Q ①). Output: oasdiff-style diff list + severity.

scripts.test: node --test test/corpus.test.js test/baseline.test.js test/check-phase-skills.test.js test/topological-sort.test.js test/cross-schema-enum.test.js test/cross-consistency-check.test.js test/canonical-single-alias.test.js test/compare-phase-flow-artifacts.test.js
